mockup_targets.prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor mobile game UI screenshot, 720×1280 portrait. Top status bar: step counter centered (white number, 28sp 思源圆体, coral #E8866A warm background). Bottom HUD bar (720×80px, island sand #F7EDD8, wood border #8B6030, soft drop shadow): beach coin icon (golden #F5C842, 32px) + number on left; three round icon buttons (80×80px each, coral gradient #F0997A→#E8866A, 24px corner radius, soft shadow) on right showing shuffle/hint/continue icons. Right sidebar (60px wide): vertical lighthouse progress bar with bamboo green fill #7DBE77, lighthouse silhouette at top. Center playfield area: 8×8 grid of cute marine tile icons (tuna, octopus, starfish etc.) with hand-drawn style. Background: desaturated coastal harbor scene. Style: Animal Crossing × Japanese healing island watercolor, soft warm pastel, round organic shapes, no sharp corners, no pure black.
mockup_targets.negative_prompt: pixel art, hyper-realistic 3D, neon colors, metallic chrome, pure black #000000, sharp geometric UI, excessive debris particles, high contrast alert colors
layout_fidelity_checks: HUD 底栏位于画面底部 80px 区域
灯塔进度条位于右侧 60px 侧栏
棋盘区域占据中间主要空间，未被 HUD 遮挡
3个辅助按钮右对齐，各 80px 宽
playfield_protection_checks: 棋盘主区域未被 HUD 元素遮挡

mockup_targets.prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor mobile game level select screen, 720×1280 portrait. Top header: chapter name in Japanese (e.g. 海辺の波止場), beach coin balance on right with golden coin icon. Main area: 2-column grid of level cards (320×180px each, island sand fill #F7EDD8, wood border #8B6030, 16px corner radius, soft shadow). Each card shows: level number (大号数字, dark brown text), 3 star icons (golden #F5C842 filled or grey empty). Some cards locked (greyed with padlock). Background: soft watercolor coastal gradient. Style: Animal Crossing healing island, warm pastel, round shapes.
mockup_targets.negative_prompt: pixel art, hyper-realistic 3D, neon colors, sharp corners, pure black
layout_fidelity_checks: 每个卡片显示 3 颗星

mockup_targets.prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor mobile game shop modal panel, 480×640px centered on screen with dark navy scrim (#1E2E50 50% opacity). Panel: warm wood texture #E8D8B4, border #8B6030 3px, 20px corner radius, soft shadow. Title: 商店 in bold 思源圆体. Item rows listing: 重排 (shuffle), 预判 (hint), 续关 (continue) — each row shows item icon, name, description, price in beach coins (golden coin icon + number). Close button top right. Style: Japanese healing island watercolor UI, wood sign aesthetic, round soft shapes.
mockup_targets.negative_prompt: pixel art, neon colors, sharp corners, metallic chrome, pure black
text_fit_checks: 道具名称和价格清晰可读

mockup_targets.prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor mobile game NPC dialogue panel, 720×200px at bottom of screen. Panel: warm wood texture #E8D8B4, border-top #8B6030 2px. Left: NPC name in wood brown #8B6030, 16sp. Main area: dialogue text in dark brown #3A2810, 15sp, 1.6 line height, max width 640px, word wrap. Bottom right: small tap-to-continue hint icon in driftwood gold #C4955A. Style: Japanese healing island watercolor, warm pastel, no sharp corners.
mockup_targets.negative_prompt: pixel art, neon colors, sharp corners, pure black, excessive decoration
text_fit_checks: 对话文字清晰可读，行高舒适

mockup_targets.prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor mobile game HUD bottom bar, 720×80px. Island sand fill #F7EDD8, wood brown border #8B6030, soft shadow 0 4px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.10). Left: small golden coin icon (32px) + beach coin number. Center: step counter number in dark brown, 28sp bold. Right: 3 square buttons (80×80px each, coral gradient, 24px corner radius): shuffle icon, magnifier/hint icon, + symbol/continue icon. All text 思源圆体. Style: Animal Crossing wooden signage UI aesthetic.
mockup_targets.negative_prompt: pixel art, neon, sharp corners, pure black
layout_fidelity_checks: 沙滩币图标+数字左对齐

mockup_targets.prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor mobile game button state sheet for 重排 (shuffle) button, 80×80px each, 4 states side by side: [normal: coral gradient #F0997A→#E8866A, shuffle swirl icon white, 重排 label 11sp white, 24px corner radius, soft shadow] [pressed: darker coral #D07862, slight scale 0.97, shadow reduced] [disabled: muted sand #C8B8A0, icon grey, opacity 0.6, no shadow] [locked: same as disabled + padlock overlay icon]. Clean white background for reference. Style: watercolor UI icons, warm pastel.
